description: This image is a screenshot of a user interface for the "Add Ingestion" process, displaying "Step 2: 'Dataset Selection Upload Dataset - Raster'". "Step 1: Input Type Selection" is shown as a preceding, completed step. The interface provides two upload methods: "File Upload" and "URL Upload". The "URL Upload" tab is active, and a direct download URL, "https://copernicus-fme.eea.europa.eu/clmsdatadownload/results/18447.zip", has been entered into the "Enter URL *" field, indicated by a green checkmark as valid. Below this, the user is prompted to define the dataset's value type, with "Continuous values" selected over "Discrete values" via radio buttons.
